parameters.query:
with items as (
  select
    s.owner_id,
    s.site_name,
    c.cert_name || ' (' || coalesce(wm.full_name, ti.tool_name) || ')' as label,
    c.expiry_date
  from certification c
  join sites s on s.id = c.site_id and s.status = 'active'
  left join workers_master wm on wm.id = c.worker_id
  left join tool_inventory ti on ti.id = c.tool_id
  where c.expiry_date <= current_date + interval '30 days'

  union all

  select
    s.owner_id,
    s.site_name,
    sc.company_name || ' insurance' as label,
    sc.insurance_expiry as expiry_date
  from subcontractor sc
  join sites s on s.id = sc.site_id and s.status = 'active'
  where sc.insurance_expiry is not null
    and sc.insurance_expiry <= current_date + interval '30 days'
)
select
  i.owner_id,
  p.phone_number as owner_phone,
  count(*) as item_count,
  string_agg(
    '- ' || i.site_name || ': ' || i.label || ' - ' ||
    case when i.expiry_date < current_date
         then 'EXPIRED ' || to_char(i.expiry_date, 'DD Mon YYYY')
         else 'expires ' || to_char(i.expiry_date, 'DD Mon YYYY')
    end,
    E'\n' order by i.expiry_date
  ) as digest_body
from items i
join profiles p on p.id = i.owner_id
group by i.owner_id, p.phone_number;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "number": $json.owner_phone.replace(/\D/g, ''), "text": "📄 *Certification & Insurance Expiry Digest*

" + $json.item_count + " item(s) expiring within 30 days:

" + $json.digest_body + "

Open Mutiso.AI to review and renew." } }}
